# Rokosan  brasil — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Rokosan is an established brand in the organic fertilizer and plant nutrition industry, originally from Israel (www.rokosan.co.il). The goal is to adapt their existing website for the Brazilian market, with all content in Brazilian Portuguese, targeting local agricultural and gardening audiences.

---

## Pages

### Início
https://example.com
Descubra soluções premium em agricultura e horticultura orgânica para o mercado brasileiro. Fertilizantes naturais que transformam solo e potencializam sua produção. Conheça agora!

### Produtos e Aplicações
https://example.com/products-applications
Explore nossa linha completa de produtos para agricultura e horticultura: fertilizantes orgânicos de alta performance para cada cultura e solo. Encontre a solução ideal para sua lavoura!

### Sobre Rokosan
https://example.com/about
Conheça a história da Rokosan, marca israelense referência mundial em agricultura e horticultura orgânica, agora adaptada para impulsionar produtores e jardineiros brasileiros. Saiba mais!

### Contacto
https://example.com/contact
Entre em contato com a equipe Rokosan brasil e receba orientação especializada em agriculture e horticultura orgânica. Estamos prontos para ajudar sua produção a crescer com mais saúde!

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Rokosan  brasil
Rokosan is an established brand in the organic fertilizer and plant nutrition industry, originally from Israel (www.rokosan.co.il). The goal is to adapt their existing website for the Brazilian market, with all content in Brazilian Portuguese, targeting local agricultural and gardening audiences.

## Target Audience
- Brazilian market
- Sustainable Farmers
- Urban Horticulturalists
- Organic Crop Producers
- Agricultural Cooperatives
- Eco-Conscious Home Gardeners

## Industry
Agriculture / Horticulture

---

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
